title: croton mazapensis var. obtusifolius
intro: Croton mazapensis var. obtusifolius, also known as the obtusifolius croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The herbal preparations of Croton mazapensis var. obtusifolius include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
